pi_items.source: JStock org.yccheok.jstock.engine.Country Enum analysis and setup_task.sh
Task instructions and explicitly matching strings in export_result.sh / verifier.py logic
Task instructions require adding exactly 2 stocks (HSBA and BP)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to operate the real JStock Java application to switch the market context. Through analysis of the application's internal org.yccheok.jstock.engine.Country Enum, it was confirmed that the UK market data directory is explicitly named 'UnitedKingdom'. The required stocks (HSBA for HSBC Holdings and BP for BP plc) are standard, real-world LSE ticker symbols, and the verifier explicitly searches for these strings in the generated CSV to confirm exactly 2 stocks were added.
